basic_details.job_title: SAIL DSP Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Steel Authority of India Limited Durgapur Steel Plant (SAIL DSP)
basic_details.short_information: Candidates up to 65 years of age who are Ex-SAIL executives (E-5 to E-7 grade) with a good service record, no ‘C’ grading in the last 3 years, and medically fit are eligible to apply for these Advisor vacancies. The application process for SAIL DSP Advisor Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 23 May 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ex-SAIL executive separated in E-5 to E-7 grade, No 'C' grading in last 3 years
qualification.details: Ex-SAIL executive separated in E-5 to E-7 grade. Must have a good service record without any disciplinary proceedings in the last 3 years. Must not have received a 'C' grading in the last 3 years. Must be medically fit.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Advisor - Projects Deptt Site execution-Iron Zone-BF&SP
Advisor - Projects Deptt Site execution-Steel Zone-SMS & Auxiliary
Advisor - Projects Deptt Site execution-Mills Zone-New Bar Mill & Others

salary_details.details: Rs. 70,000/- to Rs. 1,00,000/- per month (for E5-E7 grade executives)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SAIL DSP Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SAIL DSP Advisor posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the SAIL DSP Advisor posts is 23rd May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Advisor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Advisor post at Steel Authority of India Limited Durgapur Steel Plant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Advisor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Ex-SAIL executives who were separated in the E-5 to E-7 grade, with a good service record and no disciplinary proceedings in the last three years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Advisor post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Advisor post is 65 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Advisor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 70,000/- to Rs. 1,00,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the Advisor recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Advisor posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a screening of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. How should candidates apply for the Advisor posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply via email by sending their complete application with all required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity at SAIL Durgapur Steel Plant.

faq.question: Q10. Which department is recruiting for these Advisor posts?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by Steel Authority of India Limited Durgapur Steel Plant (SAIL DSP).
